debug_info.goal:
case hac
R : Type u_1
A : Type u_2
C : Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : CommSemiring R
inst✝⁴ : CommSemiring A
inst✝³ : CommSemiring C
inst✝² : HopfAlgebra R A
inst✝¹ : HopfAlgebra R C
inst✝ : IsCocomm R C
⊢ failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)

proof:
ext x
      simpa using (congrArg (fun f => f x) (LinearMap.comul_right_inv (R := R) (C := C)))
failed_attempts:
ext c
      simpa using (LinearMap.comul_right_inv (R := R) (C := C) c)

ext x
      simpa using (Bialgebra.antipode_comp_comul (R := R) (A := C) x)

intro x
      simpa using (HopfAlgebra.antipode_comul (R := R) (A := C) x)

ext x
      simpa using (HopfAlgebra.antipode_comul (R := R) (A := C) x)

ext x
      simpa using congrArg (fun f => f x) LinearMap.comul_right_inv

ext x
      simpa using (HopfAlgebra.antipode_comul (R := R) (A := C) x)
simpa using (congrArg (fun f => f ∘ₗ comul) (HopfAlgebra.antipode_mul_antidistrib (R := R) (A := C)))

ext x <;>
      simp [TensorProduct.map_tmul, HopfAlgebra.antipode_mul_antidistrib, mul_comm, mul_left_comm,
        mul_assoc]
ext x <;> simp [HopfAlgebra.antipode_mul_antidistrib, map_mul, map_add, map_smul]

ext a
      simpa [IsCocomm.comul_comm] using (congrArg (fun f => f a) comul_right_inv)
intro x; simpa using (comul_comp_antipode (R := R) (A := C) x)

ext a b
      simpa [HopfAlgebra.antipodeAlgHom, HopfAlgebra.antipode_mul_antidistrib] using
        (congrArg (fun x => x) (by
          simp [TensorProduct.comm_tmul, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc]))
successful_attempts:
ext x
      simpa using (congrArg (fun f => f x) (LinearMap.comul_right_inv (R := R) (C := C)))

ext x
      simpa [LinearMap.convMul_def, LinearMap.convOne_def, LinearMap.comul_right_inv (R := R) (C := C)] using
        congrArg (fun f => f x) (LinearMap.comul_right_inv (R := R) (C := C))
